segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm off to lunch. I think I'll try out that new sushi restaurant. Really? I was there just last night. The sushi was incredibly fresh and tasty. Awesome. I love good sushi. The service left a lot to be desired, but the food is definitely worth it. Tell me what you think about it. I sure will.
